name: reject-malformed-task-context-jsonl
title: Reject malformed task context JSONL
description: Fail closed when changed Trellis task context manifests contain malformed non-empty JSONL rows, with deterministic diagnostics and regression coverage.

notes: Consumer PR #8 exposed a fail-open JSONL parse path in the 0.32.1 preflight payload.
